title: Generate TTS and speak in VC

log.context: Generate TTS and speak in VC

Audio file generated and ready at **`/tmp/vc-test.wav`** (235K WAV). Used Kokoro TTS with the `bm_george` voice. The text is: "Hello from Clungus the two hundred and fifteenth. Voice test successful."

You can now play it via the `speak` tool with that path. I also had to install `kokoro-onnx` and `soundfile` packages -- they weren't previously installed on this system.
